reasoning: The control 3.3.1 from NIST 800-171 focuses on creating and retaining audit logs to monitor and investigate unauthorized activities. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to enabling audit logging, configuring log retention policies, and ensuring audit policies capture necessary metadata. These functions ensure that Kubernetes clusters have the necessary audit logging capabilities to monitor and analyze system activities.
title: 3_3_1: 3.3.1 Create and retain system audit logs and records to the extent needed to enable the monitoring, analysis, investigation, and reporting of unlawful or unauthorized system activity
